consume(uint256,address,bytes,uint256).details: Called by Marketplace after funds are secured      Should revert if resource cannot be created (e.g. race condition)

params.amountPaid: Amount that was paid and escrowed

onOrderSettled(uint256,uint256,uint8).details: Allows modules to update state based on settlement outcome

params.resourceId: Module-specific resource identifier returned by consume()

quote(uint256,bytes,uint256).details: Should revert if product is unavailable or params are invalid

params.basePrice: Base price from the Marketplace offer
params.params: ABI-encoded module-specific parameters (e.g. dates for housing)
params.productId: Module-specific product identifier (e.g. unitId for housing)

returns.finalPrice: The computed final price for this purchase

consume(uint256,address,bytes,uint256).notice: Create a resource after payment has been escrowed

onOrderSettled(uint256,uint256,uint8).notice: Optional hook called after order settlement

quote(uint256,bytes,uint256).notice: Calculate final price for a product purchase
